creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 4/29/12 5:50 PM, Michael Scheidell wrote:
> won't apply.  mostly, since you don't have index markers, (which would 
> make life easier)
>
> ../fcitx.orig/files/
>
maybe it's the chinese chars:  it looks like it didn't apply any of this 
part of the patch:


ls -lt tp*
-rw-r--r--  1 scheidell  scheidell   401 Apr 29 17:27 
tpunc-data_punc.mb.zh_CN
-rw-r--r--  1 scheidell  scheidell  1080 Apr 29 17:27 
tpunc-data_punc.mb.zh_CN.rej
-rw-r--r--  1 scheidell  scheidell   401 Feb  7 15:57 
tpunc-data_punc.mb.zh_CN.orig


%md5 tpunc-data_punc.mb.zh_CN*
MD5 (tpunc-data_punc.mb.zh_CN) = 800c3d8f7f115b900f13990c06ba5c6e
MD5 (tpunc-data_punc.mb.zh_CN.orig) = 800c3d8f7f115b900f13990c06ba5c6e
